title: Case Results Section Rendering Broken Sitewide — Internally Identified
description:
Seeking help w/ the reported issue below please.

 
Primary URL: https://www.fhvlegal.com/attorneys/ (confirmed broken; also confirmed on https://www.fhvlegal.com/medical-malpractice-attorney/ — issue appears sitewide on any page containing this element)

Summary: The "Case Results" section is rendering incorrectly sitewide. The copy is visually displaced and appearing in unintended positions on the page. This was identified internally and confirmed on at least two URLs. Any page containing the Case Results element is likely affected. 
 Requirements for Completion:
  • Case Results section renders correctly on all pages where the element is present
  • Case Results copy appears within its intended layout boundaries with no displacement or overflow
  • No visual formatting issues on desktop or mobile
  • Confirmed on /attorneys/, /medical-malpractice-attorney/, and any additional pages where the element is used
 
Thanks much!

title: Remove specific content from the FHV Legal website
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Jordan, Keith Bruss, Predrag
description:
Seeking help with this urgent request please.

Please remove specific content from the FHV Legal website. A physician, Dr. Caleb Stalls, has contacted the firm alleging a violation of Florida Statute § 540.08 regarding the unauthorized commercial use of his name and likeness. 

This matter is urgent as there is a threat of legal action if the content is not updated within three business days.

Please carry out the following actionable steps immediately:

- Locate the Target Page: Access the "HCA Kendall Medical Malpractice" page at the following URL: https://www.fhvlegal.com/medical-malpractice-attorney/florida-kendall-hospital/ (https://www.fhvlegal.com/medical-malpractice-attorney/florida-kendall-hospital/)
- Identify the Section: Find the specific subsection titled "Anesthesiologist Fined for Patient Death at HCA Kendall."
- Remove Personal Identifiers: Per the client's instructions, remove the name "Dr. Caleb Stalls" and any direct references to him.
- Replace with Generic Language: Update the text to refer to the individual generically as "a doctor" or "the anesthesiologist" rather than using his specific name.
- Review for SEO/Metadata: Ensure his name is also removed from any image alt text, headers, or metadata associated with that specific section. 

Thanks much!

title: Vulnerability plugins on the site
assignees: Ethan Vandenberg, Keith Bruss, Predrag, Savana
description:
These plugins are vulnerable on the site.


  Recommended Action                                             
                   
  1. Deactivate and delete PAFE free + PAFE Pro immediately — no content depends on them. you can do this now.


2. For JetSmartFilters: Before removing, you need to edit the two templates in Elementor:


This plugin is vulnerable and also in use on the website.  It is used to add filters to the blog post and video archive posts:

https://www.fhvlegal.com/blog/

https://www.fhvlegal.com/video/
Our suggestion is to remove this immediately:

    - Open the Blog Feed template (Elementor Library → post 1062) and remove/replace the checkboxes filter widget                                                                                       
    - Open the Video Archive template (post 1364) and remove/replace the search filter widget               

Once those widgets are removed or replaced, JetSmartFilters can be safely deactivated and deleted. 

Alternatively somebody can purchase a license for JetSmartFilters at $43/year so we can continue to receive updates to this plugin. https://crocoblock.com/plugins/jetsmartfilters/

We can also look into replacing the functionality with a free or developed solution.

Does the client really want to keep the Videos page? The videos each have their own page with embedded + transcript, even though they're embedded in blog posts anyway:
e.g.:
  • https://www.fhvlegal.com/blog/examples-of-bad-bedside-manner-versus-medical-malpractice/ 
  • https://www.fhvlegal.com/video/the-difference-between-bad-bedside-manner-and-medical-malpractice/

title: Main Menu
description:
I feel the Main Menu could use some work. I would go for:

  • Home (they don't have a Home button atm)
  • About (dropdown: About FHVG; Attorneys - each has their own page; Testimonials)
  • Practice areas* (dropdown: Medical Malpractice; Nursing Home Negligence; Mass Torts; Defective Drugs & Devices)
  • Case Results (should be more visible, and competition already has it on the main menu)
  • Resources** (either keep this and only show Blog + FAQs in the dropdown OR replace Resources with Blog to keep it simple and move FAQs to About + footer)
  • Locations (current dropdown)
  • Contact

*Medical Malpractice is currently very visible in the main menu, but its dropdown is a bit chaotic. Also, I feel "All Legal Services" should also be more visible - atm it's located under About. 

**Resources currently has 2 guides and 1 quiz in its dropdown - could we move them under Blog?

title: Welcome Email
description: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1s9-e7o19rttsfSAGtPf3J7CPr_VigrUkW5089s9CXBQ/edit?usp=sharing

title: Establish LSA Access
description:
1. Pull the CID from the onboarding form (found under "CLIENT WORKBOOK" door on the project's front page, then the "Project Details" tab. Should be ROW 28.)
  2. Send a management request using the Google Ads interface. TUTORIAL
  3. Verify that the management request was sent. TUTORIAL
  4. Send the client an email advising them to look out for the management request. >>> USE THIS EMAIL TEMPLATE <<<
  5. Check this off once the client has accepted the management request.

title: Add client to LSA Master Sheet
description:
MASTER SHEET

This includes:
  1. Adding the client to the "LSA DIRECTORY" tab
  2. Adding the client's master sheet tab to the project and linking it accordingly in the directory

TUTORIAL

title: Forward client to rep for review
description:
Submit a review request to our Google rep using the REP REQUESTS SHEET

Paste findings under the "Audit Review Call" task to be reviewed on the call

TUTORIAL

title: Order LSA Dashboard(s)
description:
1. Navigate to the Blackcoffer chat; LINK
  2. Provide them with the CID(S) and CLIENT NAME
  3. Log the request in the Master Sheet under "DASHBOARD REQUESTS"
TUTORIAL

title: Schedule audit review call
description:
Set up a time with the client to review their audit together. >>> USE THIS TEMPLATE <<<

Take notes on action items to send to the client after the meeting has been conducted.

Once scheduled, add the date and time to the "Audit Review Call" task

title: Implement completed dashboard
description:
1. Create a vanity URL using Rebrandly.com (format: /ClientName)
  2. Add completed dashboard link to the Master Sheet in the client's "LSA DIRECTORY" line
  3. Add the dashboard as a door on the project
  4. Ensure the dashboard is set to "Unlisted"
TUTORIAL

title: Audit Review Call
description:
• Walk the client through their dashboard
  • Review LSA rep findings
  • Done-with-you audit
  • Validate:
    • Address
    • Phone number
    • Message lead number
    • Business hours
    • Listed attorneys
